title: something different Witches Brew Black Ceramic Tea Pot
features: Witches Brew Black Ceramic Tea Pot
Gather around the kitchen table and get ready to spill the tea in style with this black ceramic 'Witches Brew' teapot. The pot holds approx 550ml - perfect for two cups of tea.
